---
title: "Mary, Queen of Scots, in Captivity: A Narrative of Events from January 1569 to December, 1584, etc."
---

## Mary, Queen of Scots, in Captivity: A Narrative of Events from January 1569 to December, 1584, etc.

**Author:** John Daniel Leader
**Date:** 1880
**Imprint:** Sheffield: Leader

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
